certificate.moduleName: Palo Alto Networks Core Crypto Module
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11 of the Security Policy. The module generates SSPs (e.g., keys) whose strengths are modified by available entropy
certificate.description: The Palo Alto Networks Core Crypto Module is a software cryptographic module that can run on various environments.

Minimum number of bits of entropy

ESV Cert. #E27 The entropy source provides 1.31221 bits of entropy per 128-bit output. The DRBG is seeded with at least 7569408 bits of output from the entropy source. Therefore, the DRBG is seeded with at least 77,598 bits of entropy. before generating keys. [PA-5410/5420/5430/5440]
Palo Alto Networks DRNG Entropy Source

The module uses entropy provided by the following ESV Certificates: E64, E65, E66, E68, E69, E70, E71, E72, E73, and E162. There are no configuration settings needed for this entropy source as per the ESV PUD. Source produces full entropy in the 384 bit seed.

ESV Cert. #E128 The entropy source provides at least .506 bits of entropy per bit of output. The DRBG is seeded with 384-bits of output from the entropy source. Therefore the DRBG is seeded with at least 194 bits of entropy before generating keys. The module generates SSPs (e.g. keys) whose strengths are modified by available entropy. [PA-220/PA-220R/PA-800/PA-3200/PA-5200/PA-7000]
Palo Alto Networks RTC Entropy Source

ESV Cert. #E130 The entropy source provides at least .5069 bits of entropy per bit of output. The DRBG is seeded with 384-bits of output from the entropy source. Therefore the DRBG is seeded with at least 194 bits of entropy before generating keys. The module generates SSPs (e.g. keys) whose strengths are modified by available entropy. [WF-500]
HMAC-SHA-256 Digital signature verification using ECDSA P-256 Note: The ECDSA and HMAC-SHA-256 KATs are performed prior to the Software integrity test
KAT using AES ECB 128 bits (Encrypt) Note: Only used for satisfying self-test requirements.
KAT using AES ECB 128 bits (Decrypt) Note: Only used for self-test.
KAT using AES CMAC 128 bits (Self-tested, but not used)
KAT: CTR_DRBG (256 bits) Note: DRBG Health Tests as specified in SP800-90A Section 11.3 are performed (i.e. instantiate/generate/reseed)
KAT using RSA 2048 bits and SHA-256 (Sign/Verify) KAT using RSA 2048 bits with SHA-256 (Encrypt/Decrypt) (Self-tested, but not used)
KAT using KAS-ECC-SSC (Shared Secret Computation) primitive Z value (P-256/384)
KAT using KAS-FFC-SSC (Shared Secret Computation) primitive Z value (2048 bits)
SP 800-56Arev3 Assurance Tests based on Sections 5.5.2, 5.6.2, and 5.6.3
